classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机侧视结构图，包含外形轮廓、轴伸和线缆位置，并标注'21±1'、'47'、'15±0.2'、'φ8 +0 -0.013'、'7.5±0.1'等尺寸与公差，工程含义为机械安装和外形尺寸说明。

text_annotations.correction_note: Merged diameter symbol, nominal value, upper and lower deviation. OCR φ13 corrected to φ8 based on visual inspection and engineering context.

translation_notes: All dimension values preserved as shown on drawing

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框为'励磁顺序'表，列出黑、绿、红、蓝线对应的A+、A-、B+、B-绕组端及顺时针、逆时针励磁极性关系，属于电机动力相线/绕组接线与极性定义，最接近动力连接器针脚定义类。

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Stepper motor electrical schematic showing phase A winding connections (A+, A-), phase B positive connection (B+), and motor designation (M). The schematic depicts coil windings and terminal connections for a two-phase stepper motor.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: B- terminal label is not detected in this cropped region but should exist based on motor winding symmetry. OCR confidence issues with some terminals required visual correction.

unresolved_items.reason: Very low confidence OCR result overlapping coil illustration area. Likely OCR noise from graphic elements, not actual text label. No clear engineering meaning in this context.
unresolved_items.action_needed: Excluded from final annotations as probable false positive

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence OCR result in lower coil area. Likely misdetection of graphic elements or rotation artifacts. No corresponding label visible in target image.
unresolved_items.action_needed: Excluded from final annotations as probable false positive

unresolved_items.reason: Expected B- terminal label not detected by OCR in this cropped region, though B+ is present. May be located outside crop boundary or detection failed.
unresolved_items.action_needed: Manual verification recommended for complete terminal labeling

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
